entries.definition:
sh–m–z to contract and shrink in aversion, to be disdainful, to be disgusted, to abhor. Of this root, only اشْمَأَزَّ ʾishmaʾazza occurs once in the Qurʾan.
اشْمَأَزَّ ʾishmaʾazza [v. VIII, intrans.] to be disdainful, to abhor, to find abhorrent (39:45) وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ اشْمَأَزَّتْ قُلُوبُ الَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink with aversion whenever God is mentioned on His own.

496
